step.title: Load changed files
step.action: Identify and read all files changed in the story implementation.

step.title: Review correctness
step.action: Verify the code correctly implements the story requirements and handles all specified scenarios.

step.title: Review patterns
step.action: Check adherence to architecture patterns, coding standards, and project conventions.

step.title: Review edge cases
step.action: Identify unhandled edge cases, error conditions, and boundary scenarios.

step.title: Produce review report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with review findings.
